description_long: This is a pair of chunky, fashion-forward sneakers predominantly in white, featuring a thick, sculpted sole with a textured, bubble-like pattern along the sides. The upper is constructed from a combination of smooth and slightly textured materials, with visible stitching and layered panels for added depth. The shoes have a standard lace-up closure with wide, flat laces and reinforced eyelets. Branding is subtly embossed on the outer side of each shoe, reading 'Acne Studios' in gold lettering. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the heel area is slightly raised for additional support. The overall design is modern and sporty, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A pair of chunky white sneakers with thick, textured soles, layered panels, and subtle gold branding. The design is modern, sporty, and well-padded for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Acne Studios' branding, layered panels, and the sculpted, bubble-textured sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel, symmetrical design, and the thickness of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side but without visible branding, showing the same layered construction and sole details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, flat laces, reinforced eyelets, and the rounded toe box.
attribute_logo: Gold 'Acne Studios' text on the outer side of each shoe near the heel.
